comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting manual acceptance test on real device: running demos/storybook_clock.py. Awaiting user visual confirmation before closure.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: User-confirmed failure: display stuck at 12:00 and not changing. Linked bug opened: kanbus-9ff5ef. Fix in progress.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Acceptance confirmation run command: python demos/clock_realtime.py --mode native_clock --sync-utc --poll-seconds 3. Expected display: device-native clock face (ClockId=0 default) updating continuously in real time without browser burst/stall behavior.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Superseded by the new three-hand clock acceptance track; historical storybook_clock acceptance item no longer active. Closing.
